subject: [CONSUL] Updated odl password
commit_message:
[CONSUL] Updated odl password

Updated ODL password for jolokia query.  The incorrect password is
currently set, which is causing the SDNC log to be flooded with
errors (failure every 15 seconds).

Issue-ID: OOM-2707
Signed-off-by: Dan Timoney <dtimoney@att.com>
Change-Id: Ie159b7cc93411cee5e40dac46a372c7a314887fe

Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/1061/ : FAILURE

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/1061/ )
